raw: Each pass provides up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person—children under the age of 18 are always admitted free. Timed ticket reservations must be made in advance of visit with library e-voucher on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email.

source_phrases.audience_policies[1].form: children under the age of 18 are always admitted free
source_phrases.restrictions.reservation_required: Timed ticket reservations must be made in advance
